title: Xtremeauto H7 Headlight Bulb - X2 H7 477 Car Headlight Bulb, 12V 55W Headlight Bulbs Light Bulbs, Dipped Headlamp Halogen Bulb PX26D Base Headlight Bulbs (Original)
features: STANDARD OEM PERFORMANCE – Reliable, bright illumination designed to match the performance of your vehicle’s original factory-fitted headlight bulbs. Perfect for everyday driving with balanced brightness and visibility.
CLEAR & CONSISTENT LIGHT OUTPUT – Produces a clean, steady white-yellow beam for excellent visibility in all weather conditions, ensuring safe night-time and low-light driving.
EASY DIRECT REPLACEMENT – Fully compatible with all vehicles requiring H7 12V 55W PX26D bulbs. Simply remove your old bulbs and install these — no modifications or wiring needed.
ROAD-LEGAL & E-MARK APPROVED – Fully compliant with UK and EU road safety standards (E-marked for legal use on public roads). Trusted performance and safety guaranteed.

TRUSTED XTREMEAUTO QUALITY – Built to high manufacturing standards for reliability, durability, and long service life. Each pack includes 2× H7 PX26D 12V 55W bulbs, suitable for both dipped and main beam applications.
description: Product Description The Xtremeauto H7 Headlight Bulb Range The Xtremeauto H7 Headlight Bulb Range delivers exceptional lighting performance, reliability, and road safety , offering options for every driver — from standard OEM replacements to high-performance upgrades. Whether you choose the Original H7 , Viper Vision 200% Brighter , or H7 LED version, each bulb is designed to provide superior visibility, long life, and effortless installation . Xtremeauto H7 LED Headlight Bulbs – Maximum Brightness & Efficiency Upgrade to cutting-edge H7 LED technology with ultra-bright illumination and energy-efficient performance. Designed for drivers seeking a modern look, these LEDs offer instant brightness , long lifespan, and improved visibility compared to standard halogen bulbs. Compatible with most vehicles requiring H7 fittings, they deliver a cool white beam and a premium, high-end appearance . Xtremeauto Original H7 Halogen Bulbs – Trusted OEM Replacement The Original H7 12V 55W halogen bulbs provide factory-level performance and consistent illumination , making them the perfect choice for everyday driving. Producing a clear, steady beam that performs well in all weather conditions, these bulbs ensure safe, reliable visibility without glare. Designed for direct replacement, they’re E-mark approved and fully road legal . Xtremeauto Viper Vision H7 Bulbs – 200% Brighter, 150m Further Vision Experience next-level brightness with the Viper Vision series , delivering up to 200% more light output and extending visibility up to 150 metres ahead . The advanced filament design provides a 20% whiter light , improving clarity and contrast for a modern HID-style look without dazzling other drivers. Perfect for those who drive frequently at night or on rural roads. Road-Legal & Reliable Performance All Xtremeauto H7 headlight bulbs are E-marked and compliant with UK and EU regulations , ensuring full road legality. No modifications are needed — simply plug and play for an instant upgrade. Why Choose Xtremeauto High-quality construction for durability and long life Universal fit for vehicles requiring H7 PX26D base bulbs Range includes LED, Standard Halogen, and High-Performance options Trusted by thousands of UK drivers for clarity, safety, and reliability Illuminate the road ahead with confidence — choose Xtremeauto H7 Headlight Bulbs for brighter, safer, and smarter driving every time you turn on your lights.
